title: SPEAR Framework Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the SPEAR (Spec, Plan, Execute, Audit, Ratchet) development framework.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for IDE auto-completion.

name.description: Project name. Used in reports and commit messages.

language.description: Primary language. 'auto' detects from project files.

description.description: Short project description for context in specs and audits.

phases.description: Phase configuration. Each phase can be enabled/disabled and require approval gates.

categories.description: The 6 audit categories. Each can be enabled/disabled with a blocking severity.

additionalProperties.description: Custom audit categories follow the same schema.

parallel.description: Run audit categories in parallel. Disable for sequential execution.

auto_fix.description: Automatically apply safe fixes for LOW/MEDIUM findings.

auto_tighten.description: Automatically tighten thresholds when metrics improve beyond the improvement threshold.

tighten_buffer_percent.description: Buffer subtracted from the new metric value when auto-tightening. Prevents brittleness.

improvement_threshold_percent.description: Minimum improvement over current threshold before auto-tightening triggers.

require_justification_to_loosen.description: Require a written justification when lowering a floor or raising a ceiling.

hooks.description: Git hook configuration. Each hook can be individually enabled/disabled.

secrets_scan.description: Scan staged files for secrets, API keys, and tokens.

lint_check.description: Run language-appropriate linter on staged files.

fitness_check.description: Run active fitness functions and check against ratchet thresholds.

dependency_audit.description: Check for known vulnerabilities in dependencies.

test_gate.description: Run test suite and check coverage against threshold.

backend.description: Storage backend. 'json' is zero-dependency. 'sqlite' and 'qdrant' are upgrade paths.

auto_index.description: Automatically update memory/index.json when entries are added.

max_entries_per_category.description: Maximum entries per memory category before auto-archiving oldest.

adapter.description: AI tool adapter. 'auto' detects from project files.

require_approval.description: Whether this phase requires explicit human approval before proceeding.

enabled.description: Whether this audit category is active.

block_on.description: Minimum severity level that blocks progression.
